markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan upcoming articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** GrowthX content is growing in Search Console and SEMrush (tracking keywords in positions 1–20), despite a Looker reporting bug.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [**Strategy:** New articles will directly counter the market's dismissive view of AI's value beyond APC, framing it as an intelligent, KPI-accelerating layer.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Pipeline:** New topics include "Society 5.0" and highly targeted terms like "clinker variability" and "energy plant-wide process control."](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [**Repurposing:** A forthcoming article will be repurposed into a blog post and social campaign once Imubit secures distribution rights.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Reporting

  - [A bug in Looker is preventing filtering for GrowthX-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [Mariana will open a support ticket to resolve the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Performance is being tracked via alternative tools:](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [**Search Console:** Shows recent growth for all GrowthX-published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [**SEMrush:** Confirms growth for keywords ranking in positions 1–20.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

### Content Strategy: Countering Market Skepticism

  - [**Problem:** A conference attendee reported a dismissive attitude among senior process engineers, who see APC as the "end of the road" and AI as unnecessary.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Solution:** Position AI as an intelligent layer that sits *on top* of existing systems.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Angle:** Connect AI's benefits directly to the target audience's KPIs to demonstrate clear value.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

### New Content Pipeline

  - [**APC to AI Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [**Goal:** Address the market disconnect by showing how AI enhances APC.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [**Angle:** Frame AI as an intelligent layer that accelerates executive KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Society 5.0:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Goal:** Explore the concept's relevance to the workforce.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [**Energy Plant-Wide Process Control:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Highly targeted term with low search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [**Clinker Variability in Cement Manufacturing:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Addresses a key industry problem with high variability.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**AI Solution:** Enables reproducible processes and greater outcome predictability, similar to the "golden batch" concept.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Capacity Utilization:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI can help companies operate closer to 100% capacity by safely reducing the "safety band" required to prevent issues.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Pillar:** Aligns with the "sustainability and safety" content pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Repurposing Existing Content

  - [**Plan:** Repurpose a forthcoming article (pending distribution rights) into a blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Blog:** Create a new post that references the original article.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Social:** Launch a campaign to drive visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:** Open a Looker support ticket to fix the reporting filter.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [**Tara:** Secure distribution rights for the article to enable repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Tara:** Provide more topic ideas to GrowthX as they become available.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Begin drafting new articles based on the discussed topics.](https://fathom.video/share/x9JFbpFnxDQaz6ybiXMvj_pZ-BLNtmNb?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
